title: Implement congress-gated execution for heartbeat proposals

log.message: Created from Congress #50 verdict on: should Clungus' heartbeat allow for (1) ideating on self improvement eg improving its reliability, r

Source verdict: The congress gate is the only thing that makes this proposal viable, and it's also what makes it worth doing. Clungus already has dead time on the heartbeat loop — using it to identify concrete reliab...
Congress-gated execution documented in heartbeat handler in /mnt/data/CLAUDE.md and /home/clungus/work/claude-config/CLAUDE.md
Congress gate implemented — rejection persistence deferred to framer decision
